claimText: CUHK penalties for academic dishonesty involving AI tools may include reviewable/permanent demerits, failure grade, suspension, lowering degree classification, and termination of studies.

citation.citationTitle: Use of Artificial Intelligence Tools in Teaching, Learning and Assessments - A Guide for Students
citation.publisher: The Chinese University of Hong Kong
